title: Application Security Checklist — Container-levelsecurityContextrecommendations
text:
Disable privilege escalations using
allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
.
Configure the root filesystem to be read-only with
readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
.
Avoid running privileged containers (set
privileged: false
).
Drop all capabilities from the containers and add back only specific ones
that are needed for operation of the container.
